prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约9253→12136→12774→17049→16183，整体呈明显后移趋势，2024年达到峰值17049后2025年小幅回升至16183，近4年后移约6 930名；2025年基准约16183名；本省理科（物理类）计划2021–2024年稳定在44–45人，2025年增至53人；2026年计划56人，较2025年扩招约5.7%，扩招幅 度适中，对竞争有一定缓解但有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第65名持续上升至2026年第57名，近年排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考 生吸引力有所增加；2025年声誉评价偏负面，涉及师德师风事件（教授考核争议）；抖音热度排名第73位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度中等；未见明显投档 断档记录；法学A（五院四系之一）、应用经济学A-，财经政法类学科实力突出，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学2026年热度为分 化观望，金融/财经/经济为分化观望，会计/财务/审计为推荐，财经类专业整体热度分化但仍有需求；本 省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；该校位于湖北武汉， 属中部地区，在陕西招生占比约1.8%（2025年），非本省高校，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+5.7%）、软科排 名持续上升、本省物理类考生大幅增加（+19.7%）等因素，扩招对竞争缓解有限，考生规模扩大和学校层次提升共同推动位次继续后移；在2025年基准16183名基础上，预计2026 年最低位次约16783名，区间16283–17283名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 9253 → 12136 → 12774 → 17049 → 16183, showing a clear overall backward trend. It peaked at 17049 in 2024 before slightly recovering to 16183 in 2025, with a backward shift of about 6,930 places over the past 4 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 16183. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan remained stable at 44–45 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 53 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 56 students, an increase of about 5.7% over 2025, a moderate expansion that provides limited relief to competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2025, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, involving a teacher ethics incident (professor assessment controversy). Douyin popularity ranking is 73rd, rated as average, with moderate exposure on short video platforms. No obvious admission cutoff gaps recorded. Law is rated A (one of the Five Academies and Four Schools), Applied Economics A-, with outstanding strength in finance, economics, and law disciplines, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, Law's popularity is divided and wait-and-see, Finance/Economics/Economy is divided and wait-and-see, Accounting/Finance/Auditing is recommended. Overall popularity of finance and economics majors is divided but still in demand. In 2026, the province has approximately 206,500 physics category candidates, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with about 1.8% of its enrollment from Shaanxi (2025), not a provincial university, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend in historical rankings, the modest enrollment expansion in 2026 (+5.7%), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, and the significant increase in provincial physics category candidates (+19.7%), the expansion provides limited relief to competition. The increase in candidate numbers and the university's rising level jointly push the ranking further backward. Based on the 2025 baseline of 16183, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 16783, with a range of 16283–17283.

- Finance (Finance, Investment)
- Statistics (Statistics, Applied Statistics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Public Administration (Administrative Management, Labor and Social Security, etc.)
- Environmental Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 16283–17283, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Law, Computer Science, Financial Engineering, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Accounting, Finance and Taxation, Finance) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Business Administration, Foreign Languages, etc.) as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<16283), prioritize sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>17283), mainly rely on Tier 3 safety net majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1659 → 1370 → 1053 → 2383 → 1495, with significant fluctuations. It peaked at 1053 in 2023, then dropped sharply to 2383 in 2024, and rebounded to 1495 in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is about 1495th place. The provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan remained stable at 38–40 students from 2021 to 2024, but decreased to 35 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 43 students, a substantial increase of about 22.9% compared to 2025, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to applicants. In 2025, its reputation was somewhat negative due to a teacher ethics incident (professor assessment controversy). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 73rd, rated as average, with moderate exposure on short video platforms. No obvious admission cutoff gaps were recorded. Law is rated A (one of the Five Academies and Four Schools), Applied Economics is A-, and its finance, economics, and law disciplines are strong, making it highly attractive to liberal arts applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the popularity of Law is divided and wait-and-see, Finance/Economics/Economy is divided and wait-and-see, and Accounting/Auditing/Finance is recommended. Finance, economics, and law majors remain attractive to liberal arts students. In 2026, the number of history category applicants in the province is about 88,500, an increase of about 17% from 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, and its enrollment share in Shaanxi is about 1.8% (2025). It is not a local university, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as large historical ranking fluctuations, a significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+22.9%), continuous improvement in Soft Science ranking, and an increase in provincial history category applicants (+17%), the expansion rate (22.9%) exceeds the applicant growth rate (17%), providing a net alleviation of competition. However, the university's improved ranking and the appeal of its Law A discipline may partially offset this relief. Based on the 2025 baseline of 1495th place, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1670th, with a range of 1170–2170th.
